Class StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig

java.lang.Object
com.github.mrgarbagegamer.StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig
Enclosing class:
StartYourMonkeys
public static final class StartYourMonkeys.GlobalConfig extends Object
GlobalConfig relies on preview features of the Java platform:
  • GlobalConfig refers to one or more preview APIs: StableValue<T>.
Programs can only use GlobalConfig when preview features are enabled.
Preview features may be removed in a future release, or upgraded to permanent features of the Java platform.
A centralized, immutable, single source of truth for all startup and derived configurations.

This class uses the Java 25 StableValuePREVIEW API to provide a robust and thread-safe mechanism for managing configuration. It holds two types of data:

  • Core Configuration: Values like NUM_CLICKSPREVIEW, NUM_THREADSPREVIEW, and BASE_GRIDPREVIEW are set once at application startup using StableValue.setOrThrow(Object)PREVIEW.
  • Derived Configuration: Values like TRUE_CELLS and CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK are computed lazily and safely on first access using StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.

This design eliminates the need for manual configuration passing and volatile fields throughout the application, simplifying component initialization and improving performance.

Since:
2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
See Also:
  • ArrayPool
  • CombinationGeneratorTask
  • CombinationQueueArray
  • TestClickCombination
  • WorkBatch
Performance Characteristics:
O(1) access for core values; lazy initialization for derived values, with amortized O(1) access thereafter.
Threading Model:
Thread-safe. Core values are set once from the main thread, and derived values are initialized safely by StableValue.
Memory Management:
Minimal overhead. Stores references and lazily-computed values.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final StableValuePREVIEW<Grid>
    BASE_GRID
    The base grid instance for the selected puzzle, set once at startup.
    static final Supplier<long[]>
    CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK
    A lazily computed lookup table where MASK[i] is a bitmask representing which of the TRUE_CELLS are adjacent to cell i.
    static final Supplier<short[]>
    EVEN_CLICK_INDICES
    A lazily computed, sorted array of cell indices that have an even-numbered (or zero) adjacency relationship with the first true cell.
    static final Supplier<int[]>
    EVEN_START_INDICES
    A lazily computed lookup table to find the starting index for final clicks in the EVEN_CLICK_INDICES array.
    static final Supplier<Long>
    EXPECTED_MASK
    A lazily computed bitmask where all bits corresponding to a true cell are set to 1.
    private static final StableValuePREVIEW<ForkJoinPool>
    GENERATOR_POOL
    The ForkJoinPool for the generators, set once after initialization.
    private static final StableValuePREVIEW<Integer>
    NUM_CLICKS
    The number of clicks to test for a solution, set once at startup.
    private static final StableValuePREVIEW<Integer>
    NUM_THREADS
    The total number of threads to use, set once at startup.
    static final Supplier<short[]>
    ODD_CLICK_INDICES
    A lazily computed, sorted array of cell indices that have an odd-numbered adjacency relationship with the first true cell.
    static final Supplier<int[]>
    ODD_START_INDICES
    A lazily computed lookup table to find the starting index for final clicks in the ODD_CLICK_INDICES array.
    static final Supplier<long[]>
    SUFFIX_OR_MASKS
    A lazily computed lookup table of "suffix OR masks" used for O(1) pruning in the generator.
    static final Supplier<short[]>
    TRUE_CELLS
    A lazily computed array of all cell indices that are initially true.

  • Field Details

    • NUM_CLICKS

      private static final StableValuePREVIEW<Integer> NUM_CLICKS
      The number of clicks to test for a solution, set once at startup.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • getNumClicks()
      • initialize(int, int, Grid)
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignment and retrieval.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Minimal overhead for storing an Integer reference.

      The total number of threads to use, set once at startup.
      Since:

      • getNumThreads()
      • initialize(int, int, Grid)
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignment and retrieval.
      Threading Model:

    • BASE_GRID

      The base grid instance for the selected puzzle, set once at startup.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • getBaseGrid()
      • initialize(int, int, Grid)
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignment and retrieval.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.

    • GENERATOR_POOL

      private static final StableValuePREVIEW<ForkJoinPool> GENERATOR_POOL
      The ForkJoinPool for the generators, set once after initialization. This is used by the monkeys to signal when generation is complete.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • getGeneratorPool()
      • setGeneratorPool(ForkJoinPool)
      • StartYourMonkeys.main(String[])
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignment and retrieval.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Minimal overhead for storing a ForkJoinPool reference.

    • TRUE_CELLS

      public static final Supplier<short[]> TRUE_CELLS
      A lazily computed array of all cell indices that are initially true.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • getBaseGrid()
      • Grid.findTrueCells()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of short of size equal to the number of true cells on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK

      public static final Supplier<long[]> CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK
      A lazily computed lookup table where MASK[i] is a bitmask representing which of the TRUE_CELLS are adjacent to cell i. This is used in generators and monkeys for incremental and in-depth pruning checks respectively.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • computeClickToTrueCellMask()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of long of size NUM_CELLS on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • EXPECTED_MASK

      public static final Supplier<Long> EXPECTED_MASK
      A lazily computed bitmask where all bits corresponding to a true cell are set to 1. This is the expected result of the final XOR sum for a valid combination, and is used in both generators and monkeys for pruning checks in combination with CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • TRUE_CELLS
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates a single Long on first access. Returns the same reference thereafter.

    • ODD_CLICK_INDICES

      public static final Supplier<short[]> ODD_CLICK_INDICES
      A lazily computed, sorted array of cell indices that have an odd-numbered adjacency relationship with the first true cell. In other words, clicking these cells will toggle the first true cell.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • BASE_GRIDPREVIEW
      • EVEN_CLICK_INDICES
      • Grid.findFirstTrueAdjacents()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of short on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • EVEN_CLICK_INDICES

      public static final Supplier<short[]> EVEN_CLICK_INDICES
      A lazily computed, sorted array of cell indices that have an even-numbered (or zero) adjacency relationship with the first true cell. In other words, clicking these cells will not toggle the first true cell.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • BASE_GRIDPREVIEW
      • ODD_CLICK_INDICES
      • Grid.invertCombination(short[])
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of short on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • SUFFIX_OR_MASKS

      public static final Supplier<long[]> SUFFIX_OR_MASKS
      A lazily computed lookup table of "suffix OR masks" used for O(1) pruning in the generator. Each entry SUFFIX_OR_MASKS[i] is the bitwise OR of all CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK values from index i to the end of the array. This allows quick determination by the generators of whether any remaining clicks can potentially touch the untoggled true cells.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • computeSuffixOrMasks()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of long of size NUM_CLICKS on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • ODD_START_INDICES

      public static final Supplier<int[]> ODD_START_INDICES
      A lazily computed lookup table to find the starting index for final clicks in the ODD_CLICK_INDICES array. This is used by WorkBatch to quickly convert click indices to their corresponding positions in the odd array, avoiding a O(log n) binary search. For a slight performance improvement, this array could be made into a short[] or even a byte[] since the maximum size of the odd array is 6, but we keep it as an int[] for simplicity and to prevent potential conversions to int later.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • EVEN_START_INDICES
      • computeStartIndices(short[])
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of int on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

    • EVEN_START_INDICES

      public static final Supplier<int[]> EVEN_START_INDICES
      A lazily computed lookup table to find the starting index for final clicks in the EVEN_CLICK_INDICES array. This is used by WorkBatch to quickly convert click indices to their corresponding positions in the even array, avoiding a O(log n) binary search. For a slight performance improvement, this array could be made into a short[] or even a byte[] since the maximum size of the even array is 103, but we keep it as an int[] for simplicity and to prevent potential conversions to int later.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • EVEN_START_INDICES
      • computeStartIndices(short[])
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) method call for computation, amortized O(1) access thereafter.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValue.supplier(Supplier)PREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of int on first access. Returns the same array reference thereafter.

  • Constructor Details

    • GlobalConfig

      private GlobalConfig()
      Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor

  • Method Details

    • isInitialized

      public static boolean isInitialized()
      Checks if all core configuration values have been initialized.
      Returns:
      true if NUM_CLICKSPREVIEW, NUM_THREADSPREVIEW, and BASE_GRIDPREVIEW are all set; false otherwise.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • isBaseGridSet()
      • isNumClicksSet()
      • isNumThreadsSet()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) checks.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • isNumClicksSet

      public static boolean isNumClicksSet()
      Checks if the NUM_CLICKSPREVIEW configuration value has been initialized.
      Returns:
      true if NUM_CLICKSPREVIEW is set; false otherwise.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • isBaseGridSet()
      • isInitialized()
      • isNumThreadsSet()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) check.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • isNumThreadsSet

      public static boolean isNumThreadsSet()
      Checks if the NUM_THREADSPREVIEW configuration value has been initialized.
      Returns:
      true if NUM_THREADSPREVIEW is set; false otherwise.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • isBaseGridSet()
      • isInitialized()
      • isNumClicksSet()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) check.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • isBaseGridSet

      public static boolean isBaseGridSet()
      Checks if the BASE_GRIDPREVIEW configuration value has been initialized.
      Returns:
      true if BASE_GRIDPREVIEW is set; false otherwise.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • isInitialized()
      • isNumClicksSet()
      • isNumThreadsSet()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) check.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • initialize

      static void initialize(int numClicks, int numThreads, Grid baseGrid)
      Initializes the global configuration values. This method is designed to be called once from the main thread at startup. While this method could be synchronized to allow
      Parameters:
      numClicks - The number of clicks to test.
      numThreads - The total number of threads to use.
      baseGrid - The initial grid instance for the puzzle.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any arguments are invalid.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • BASE_GRIDPREVIEW
      • NUM_CLICKSPREVIEW
      • NUM_THREADSPREVIEW
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignments.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe when called from a single thread at startup.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates two Integer objects for primitive boxing.

    • setGeneratorPool

      public static void setGeneratorPool(ForkJoinPool pool)
      Sets the ForkJoinPool for the generators. This method should be called once after initialization.
      Parameters:
      pool - The ForkJoinPool to use for combination generation.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • GENERATOR_POOLPREVIEW
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) assignment.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe when called from a single thread after initialization.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

    • getGeneratorPool

      public static ForkJoinPool getGeneratorPool()
      Retrieves the ForkJoinPool used for combination generation.
      Returns:
      The configured ForkJoinPool.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • GENERATOR_POOLPREVIEW
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) retrieval.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:
      Does not allocate.

      Threading Model:

    • getBaseGrid

      public static Grid getBaseGrid()
      Retrieves the base grid instance for the selected puzzle.
      Returns:
      The base Grid.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor

      Performance Characteristics:
      O(1) retrieval.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe via StableValuePREVIEW.
      Memory Management:

    • computeClickToTrueCellMask

      private static long[] computeClickToTrueCellMask()
      Computes the click-to-true-cell adjacency masks for all cells in the grid.
      Returns:
      An array where MASK[i] is a bitmask of which true cells are adjacent to cell i.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK
      • TRUE_CELLS
      • Grid.areAdjacent(short, short)
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(NUM_CELLS * T) where T is the number of true cells.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe; does not modify shared state.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of long of size NUM_CELLS.

    • computeSuffixOrMasks

      private static long[] computeSuffixOrMasks()
      Computes the suffix OR masks for pruning in the generator.
      Returns:
      An array where MASK[i] is the OR of all click-to-true-cell masks from index i to the end.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • CLICK_TO_TRUE_CELL_MASK
      • SUFFIX_OR_MASKS
      • computeClickToTrueCellMask()
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(NUM_CELLS).
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe; does not modify shared state.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of long of size NUM_CELLS + 1.

    • computeStartIndices

      private static int[] computeStartIndices(short[] validClicks)
      Computes the start indices for valid clicks in the given array.
      Parameters:
      validClicks - An array of valid click indices.
      Returns:
      An array where START[i] is the first index in validClicks greater than i.
      Since:
      2025.12 - Global Configuration Refactor
      See Also:
      • EVEN_CLICK_INDICES
      • EVEN_START_INDICES
      • ODD_CLICK_INDICES
      • ODD_START_INDICES
      Performance Characteristics:
      O(NUM_CELLS + V) where V is the length of validClicks.
      Threading Model:
      Thread-safe; does not modify shared state.
      Memory Management:
      Allocates an array of int of size NUM_CELLS.

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
